====================================================================================================
LL(1) 预测分析表
====================================================================================================

非终结符                     | !           | !=          | #           | %           | &&          | (           | )           | *           | *=          | +           | ++          | +=          | ,           | -           | --          | -=          | .           | /           | /=          | :           | ;           | <           | <=          | =           | ==          | >           | >=          | [           | ]           | break       | case        | char        | continue    | default     | do          | double      | else        | float       | for         | id          | if          | include     | int         | long        | num         | return      | short       | str_lit     | struct      | switch      | typedef     | void        | while       | {           | }           | $           
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ARGS                     | EXPR ARGS_TAIL|             |             |             |             | EXPR ARGS_TAIL| ε           |             |             |             | EXPR ARGS_TAIL|             |             | EXPR ARGS_TAIL| EXPR ARGS_TAIL|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | EXPR ARGS_TAIL|             |             |             |             | EXPR ARGS_TAIL|             |             | EXPR ARGS_TAIL|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
ARGS_TAIL                |             |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             |             |             |             |             | , EXPR ARGS_TAIL|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
ARITH_EXPR               | TERM ARITH_TAIL|             |             |             |             | TERM ARITH_TAIL|             |             |             |             | TERM ARITH_TAIL|             |             | TERM ARITH_TAIL| TERM ARITH_TAIL|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | TERM ARITH_TAIL|             |             |             |             | TERM ARITH_TAIL|             |             | TERM ARITH_TAIL|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
ARITH_TAIL               | ε           | ε           |             |             | ε           | ε           | ε           |             |             | + TERM ARITH_TAIL| ε           |             | ε           | - TERM ARITH_TAIL| ε           |             |             |             |             |             | ε           | ε           | ε           |             | ε           | ε           | ε           |             | ε           |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             |             |             |             | ε           |             |             | ε           |             |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             
ARR_OPT                  |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             |             |             |             |             |             | [ num ]     |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
ASSIGN_TAIL              |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | ;           |             |             | = EXPR ;    |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
BASE_TYPE                |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | char        |             |             |             | double      |             | float       |             |             |             |             | int         | long        |             |             | short       |             |             |             |             | void        |             |             |             |             
BLOCK                    |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | { STMT_LIST }|             |             
CASE_ITEM                |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | case num : STMT_LIST|             |             | default : STMT_LIST|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
CASE_LIST                |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | CASE_ITEM CASE_LIST|             |             | CASE_ITEM CASE_LIST|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             
COMPARE_EXPR             | ARITH_EXPR COMPARE_TAIL|             |             |             |             | ARITH_EXPR COMPARE_TAIL|             |             |             |             | ARITH_EXPR COMPARE_TAIL|             |             | ARITH_EXPR COMPARE_TAIL| ARITH_EXPR COMPARE_TAIL|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | ARITH_EXPR COMPARE_TAIL|             |             |             |             | ARITH_EXPR COMPARE_TAIL|             |             | ARITH_EXPR COMPARE_TAIL|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
COMPARE_TAIL             | ε           | != ARITH_EXPR COMPARE_TAIL|             |             | ε           | ε           | ε           |             |             |             | ε           |             | ε           | ε           | ε           |             |             |             |             |             | ε           | < ARITH_EXPR COMPARE_TAIL| <= ARITH_EXPR COMPARE_TAIL|             | == ARITH_EXPR COMPARE_TAIL| > ARITH_EXPR COMPARE_TAIL| >= ARITH_EXPR COMPARE_TAIL|             | ε           |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             |             |             |             | ε           |             |             | ε           |             |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             
COND_EXPR                | LOGIC_OR_EXPR|             |             |             |             | LOGIC_OR_EXPR|             |             |             |             | LOGIC_OR_EXPR|             |             | LOGIC_OR_EXPR| LOGIC_OR_EXPR|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | LOGIC_OR_EXPR|             |             |             |             | LOGIC_OR_EXPR|             |             | LOGIC_OR_EXPR|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
COND_EXPR_OPT            | COND_EXPR   |             |             |             |             | COND_EXPR   |             |             |             |             | COND_EXPR   |             |             | COND_EXPR   | COND_EXPR   |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | COND_EXPR   |             |             |             |             | COND_EXPR   |             |             | COND_EXPR   |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
ELSE_PART                |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | ε           | ε           | ε           | ε           | ε           | ε           | ε           | else STMT_OR_BLOCK| ε           | ε           | ε           | ε           |             | ε           | ε           |             | ε           | ε           |             | ε           | ε           |             | ε           | ε           |             | ε           |             
EXPR                     | COND_EXPR   |             |             |             |             | COND_EXPR   |             |             |             |             | COND_EXPR   |             |             | COND_EXPR   | COND_EXPR   |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | COND_EXPR   |             |             |             |             | COND_EXPR   |             |             | COND_EXPR   |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
EXPR_OPT                 | EXPR        |             |             |             |             | EXPR        |             |             |             |             | EXPR        |             |             | EXPR        | EXPR        |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | EXPR        |             |             |             |             | EXPR        |             |             | EXPR        |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
EXT_DEF                  |             |             | MACRO       |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | FUNC_OR_VAR |             |             |             | FUNC_OR_VAR |             | FUNC_OR_VAR |             | FUNC_OR_VAR |             |             | FUNC_OR_VAR | FUNC_OR_VAR |             |             | FUNC_OR_VAR |             | STRUCT_DEF  |             | TYPEDEF_STRUCT| FUNC_OR_VAR |             |             |             |

FIELDS                   |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | TYPE id ARR_OPT ; FIELDS|             |             |             | TYPE id ARR_OPT ; FIELDS|             | TYPE id ARR_OPT ; FIELDS|             | TYPE id ARR_OPT ; FIELDS|             |             | TYPE id ARR_OPT ; FIELDS| TYPE id ARR_OPT ; FIELDS|             |             | TYPE id ARR_OPT ; FIELDS|             | TYPE id ARR_OPT ; FIELDS|             |             | TYPE id ARR_OPT ; FIELDS|             |             | ε           |             
FOR_INIT                 |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | BASE_TYPE id = EXPR|             |             |             | BASE_TYPE id = EXPR|             | BASE_TYPE id = EXPR|             | id = EXPR   |             |             | BASE_TYPE id = EXPR| BASE_TYPE id = EXPR|             |             | BASE_TYPE id = EXPR|             |             |             |             | BASE_TYPE id = EXPR|             |             |             |             
FOR_UPDATE               |             |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | id FOR_UPDATE_OP|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
FOR_UPDATE_OP            |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | ++          | += EXPR     |             |             | --          | -= EXPR     |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | = EXPR      |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
FUNC_OR_VAR              |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | TYPE id FUNC_OR_VAR_TAIL|             |             |             | TYPE id FUNC_OR_VAR_TAIL|             | TYPE id FUNC_OR_VAR_TAIL|             | TYPE id FUNC_OR_VAR_TAIL|             |             | TYPE id FUNC_OR_VAR_TAIL| TYPE id FUNC_OR_VAR_TAIL|             |             | TYPE id FUNC_OR_VAR_TAIL|             | TYPE id FUNC_OR_VAR_TAIL|             |             | TYPE id FUNC_OR_VAR_TAIL|             |             |             |             
FUNC_OR_VAR_TAIL         |             |             |             |             |             | ( PARAMS ) BLOCK|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | ;           |             |             | = INITIALIZER ;|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
HEADER_CONTENT           |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | id HEADER_TAIL|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
HEADER_TAIL              |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | . id        |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
ID_STMT_TAIL             |             |             |             |             |             | STMT_PRIME  |             |             | STMT_PRIME  |             | STMT_PRIME  | STMT_PRIME  |             |             | STMT_PRIME  | STMT_PRIME  | STMT_PRIME  |             | STMT_PRIME  |             |             |             |             | STMT_PRIME  |             |             |             | STMT_PRIME  |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |

PARAMS                   |             |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | PARAM PARAMS_TAIL|             |             |             | PARAM PARAMS_TAIL|             | PARAM PARAMS_TAIL|             | PARAM PARAMS_TAIL|             |             | PARAM PARAMS_TAIL| PARAM PARAMS_TAIL|             |             | PARAM PARAMS_TAIL|             | PARAM PARAMS_TAIL|             |             | PARAM PARAMS_TAIL|             |             |             |

POSTFIX_TAIL             | ε           | ε           |             | ε           | ε           | ( ARGS ) POSTFIX_TAIL| ε           | ε           |             | ε           | ++ POSTFIX_TAIL|             | ε           | ε           | -- POSTFIX_TAIL|             | . id POSTFIX_TAIL| ε           |             |             | ε           | ε           | ε           |             | ε           | ε           | ε           | [ EXPR ] POSTFIX_TAIL| ε           |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             |             |             |             | ε           |             |             | ε           |             |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             
PRIMARY                  |             |             |             |             |             | ( COND_EXPR )|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | id          |             |             |             |             | num         |             |             | str_lit     |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
PROGRAM                  |             |             | EXT_DEF_LIST|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | EXT_DEF_LIST|             |             |             | EXT_DEF_LIST|             | EXT_DEF_LIST|             | EXT_DEF_LIST|             |             | EXT_DEF_LIST| EXT_DEF_LIST|             |             | EXT_DEF_LIST|             | EXT_DEF_LIST|             | EXT_DEF_LIST| EXT_DEF_LIST|             |             |             | EXT_DEF_LIST
PTR_OPT                  |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | * PTR_OPT   |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
SIMPLE_STMT              |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | break ;     |             | BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT id VAR_DECL_TAIL| continue ;  |             |             | BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT id VAR_DECL_TAIL|             | BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT id VAR_DECL_TAIL|             | id ID_STMT_TAIL|             |             | BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT id VAR_DECL_TAIL| BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT id VAR_DECL_TAIL|             | return EXPR_OPT ;| BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT id VAR_DECL_TAIL|             |             |             |             | BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT id VAR_DECL_TAIL|             |             |             |             
STMT                     |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | break ;     |             | BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT id VAR_DECL_TAIL| continue ;  |             | do STMT_OR_BLOCK while ( COND_EXPR ) ;| BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT id VAR_DECL_TAIL|             | BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT id VAR_DECL_TAIL| for ( FOR_INIT ; COND_EXPR_OPT ; FOR_UPDATE ) STMT_OR_BLOCK| id ID_STMT_TAIL| if ( COND_EXPR ) STMT_OR_BLOCK ELSE_PART|             | BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT id VAR_DECL_TAIL| BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT id VAR_DECL_TAIL|             | return EXPR_OPT ;| BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT id VAR_DECL_TAIL|             | struct id PTR_OPT id VAR_DECL_TAIL| switch ( EXPR ) { CASE_LIST }|             | BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT id VAR_DECL_TAIL| while ( COND_EXPR ) STMT_OR_BLOCK|             |             |             
STMT_LIST                |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | STMT STMT_LIST| ε           | STMT STMT_LIST| STMT STMT_LIST| ε           | STMT STMT_LIST| STMT STMT_LIST|             | STMT STMT_LIST| STMT STMT_LIST| STMT STMT_LIST| STMT STMT_LIST|             | STMT STMT_LIST| STMT STMT_LIST|             | STMT STMT_LIST| STMT STMT_LIST|             | STMT STMT_LIST| STMT STMT_LIST|             | STMT STMT_LIST| STMT STMT_LIST|             | ε           |             
STMT_OR_BLOCK            |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | SIMPLE_STMT |             | SIMPLE_STMT | SIMPLE_STMT |             |             | SIMPLE_STMT |             | SIMPLE_STMT |             | SIMPLE_STMT |             |             | SIMPLE_STMT | SIMPLE_STMT |             | SIMPLE_STMT | SIMPLE_STMT |             |             |             |             | SIMPLE_STMT |             | { STMT_LIST }|             |             
STMT_PRIME               |             |             |             |             |             | ( ARGS ) ;  |             |             | *= EXPR ;   |             | ++ ;        | += EXPR ;   |             |             | -- ;        | -= EXPR ;   | . id MEMBER_ACCESS_TAIL STMT_PRIME_TAIL|             | /= EXPR ;   |             |             |             |             | = EXPR ;    |             |             |             | [ EXPR ] ASSIGN_TAIL|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
STMT_PRIME_TAIL          |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | ;           |             |             | = EXPR ;    |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
STRUCT_DEF               |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | struct id { FIELDS } STRUCT_NAME_OPT ;|             |             |             |             |             |             |             
STRUCT_NAME_OPT          |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | id          |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
TERM                     | UNARY_EXPR TERM_TAIL|             |             |             |             | UNARY_EXPR TERM_TAIL|             |             |             |             | UNARY_EXPR TERM_TAIL|             |             | UNARY_EXPR TERM_TAIL| UNARY_EXPR TERM_TAIL|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | UNARY_EXPR TERM_TAIL|             |             |             |             | UNARY_EXPR TERM_TAIL|             |             | UNARY_EXPR TERM_TAIL|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
TERM_TAIL                | ε           | ε           |             | % UNARY_EXPR TERM_TAIL| ε           | ε           | ε           | * UNARY_EXPR TERM_TAIL|             | ε           | ε           |             | ε           | ε           | ε           |             |             | / UNARY_EXPR TERM_TAIL|             |             | ε           | ε           | ε           |             | ε           | ε           | ε           |             | ε           |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             |             |             |             | ε           |             |             | ε           |             |             |             |             |             |             | ε           |             
TYPE                     |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT|             |             |             | BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT|             | BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT|             | USER_TYPE PTR_OPT|             |             | BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT| BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT|             |             | BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT|             | USER_TYPE PTR_OPT|             |             | BASE_TYPE PTR_OPT|             |             |             |             
TYPEDEF_STRUCT           |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | typedef struct id { FIELDS } id ;|             |             |             |             |             
UNARY_EXPR               | ! UNARY_EXPR|             |             |             |             | POSTFIX_EXPR|             |             |             |             | ++ id       |             |             | - UNARY_EXPR| -- id       |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | POSTFIX_EXPR|             |             |             |             | POSTFIX_EXPR|             |             | POSTFIX_EXPR|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
USER_TYPE                |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | id          |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | struct id   |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
VAR_DECL_TAIL            |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | ;           |             |             | = INITIALIZER ;|             |             |             | [ num ] VAR_DECL_TAIL2|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             
VAR_DECL_TAIL2           |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             | ;           |             |             | = INITIALIZER ;|             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             |             

====================================================================================================
关键非终结符的FIRST集和FOLLOW集
====================================================================================================

FIRST(PROGRAM): ['#', 'char', 'double', 'float', 'id', 'int', 'long', 'short', 'struct', 'typedef', 'void', 'ε']
FOLLOW(PROGRAM): ['$']

FIRST(EXT_DEF_LIST): ['#', 'char', 'double', 'float', 'id', 'int', 'long', 'short', 'struct', 'typedef', 'void', 'ε']
FOLLOW(EXT_DEF_LIST): ['$']

FIRST(EXT_DEF): ['#', 'char', 'double', 'float', 'id', 'int', 'long', 'short', 'struct', 'typedef', 'void']
FOLLOW(EXT_DEF): ['#', '$', 'char', 'double', 'float', 'id', 'int', 'long', 'short', 'struct', 'typedef', 'void']

FIRST(STRUCT_DEF): ['struct']
FOLLOW(STRUCT_DEF): ['#', '$', 'char', 'double', 'float', 'id', 'int', 'long', 'short', 'struct', 'typedef', 'void']

FIRST(FIELDS): ['char', 'double', 'float', 'id', 'int', 'long', 'short', 'struct', 'void', 'ε']
FOLLOW(FIELDS): ['}']

FIRST(TYPE): ['char', 'double', 'float', 'id', 'int', 'long', 'short', 'struct', 'void']
FOLLOW(TYPE): ['id']

FIRST(STMT): ['break', 'char', 'continue', 'do', 'double', 'float', 'for', 'id', 'if', 'int', 'long', 'return', 'short', 'struct', 'switch', 'void', 'while']
FOLLOW(STMT): ['break', 'case', 'char', 'continue', 'default', 'do', 'double', 'float', 'for', 'id', 'if', 'int', 'long', 'return', 'short', 'struct', 'switch', 'void', 'while', '}']

FIRST(EXPR): ['!', '(', '++', '-', '--', 'id', 'num', 'str_lit']
FOLLOW(EXPR): [')', ',', ';', ']', '}']

FIRST(COND_EXPR): ['!', '(', '++', '-', '--', 'id', 'num', 'str_lit']
FOLLOW(COND_EXPR): [')', ',', ';', ']', '}']

FIRST(ARITH_EXPR): ['!', '(', '++', '-', '--', 'id', 'num', 'str_lit']
FOLLOW(ARITH_EXPR): ['!', '!=', '&&', '(', ')', '++', ',', '-', '--', ';', '<', '<=', '==', '>', '>=', ']', 'id', 'num', 'str_lit', '}']

FIRST(TERM): ['!', '(', '++', '-', '--', 'id', 'num', 'str_lit']
FOLLOW(TERM): ['!', '!=', '&&', '(', ')', '+', '++', ',', '-', '--', ';', '<', '<=', '==', '>', '>=', ']', 'id', 'num', 'str_lit', '}']

FIRST(PRIMARY): ['(', 'id', 'num', 'str_lit']
FOLLOW(PRIMARY): ['!', '!=', '%', '&&', '(', ')', '*', '+', '++', ',', '-', '--', '.', '/', ';', '<', '<=', '==', '>', '>=', '[', ']', 'id', 'num', 'str_lit', '}']
